query:
INSERT INTO appeals (parcelId, appealDate, currentAssessedValue, appealedValue, appealReason, status, createdAt) VALUES
('001-100-001', NOW(), 450000, 420000, 'Comparable sales indicate overvaluation', 'pending', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 DAY)),
('001-100-002', NOW(), 380000, 350000, 'Property condition not reflected in assessment', 'pending', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY)),
('001-100-003', NOW(), 520000, 480000, 'Recent market downturn not considered', 'in_review', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 5 DAY)),
('001-100-004', NOW(), 295000, 270000, 'Assessment exceeds neighborhood median', 'pending', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)),
('001-100-005', NOW(), 675000, 625000, 'Incorrect square footage in records', 'in_review', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 DAY)),
('002-200-001', NOW(), 410000, 385000, 'Similar properties assessed lower', 'pending', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 12 DAY)),
('002-200-002', NOW(), 550000, 510000, 'Property damage from storm not accounted', 'hearing_scheduled', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 14 DAY)),
('002-200-003', NOW(), 320000, 295000, 'Zoning restrictions limit property value', 'pending', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 15 DAY)),
('002-200-004', NOW(), 780000, 720000, 'Overvaluation based on outdated comparables', 'in_review', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 18 DAY)),
('002-200-005', NOW(), 425000, 395000, 'Assessment ignores deferred maintenance', 'pending', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 20 DAY)),
('003-300-001', NOW(), 510000, 475000, 'Market analysis shows lower fair value', 'resolved', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 22 DAY)),
('003-300-002', NOW(), 365000, 340000, 'Property tax burden disproportionate', 'pending', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 25 DAY)),
('003-300-003', NOW(), 890000, 825000, 'Comparable properties sold for less', 'in_review', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 27 DAY)),
('003-300-004', NOW(), 445000, 415000, 'Assessment methodology flawed', 'pending', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 28 DAY)),
('003-300-005', NOW(), 620000, 575000, 'Property improvements not completed', 'withdrawn', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 29 DAY)),
('004-400-001', NOW(), 355000, 330000, 'Neighborhood decline not reflected', 'pending', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)),
('004-400-002', NOW(), 725000, 675000, 'Assessment based on incorrect lot size', 'in_review', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 4 DAY)),
('004-400-003', NOW(), 480000, 445000, 'Recent sales data supports lower value', 'pending', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 DAY)),
('004-400-004', NOW(), 590000, 550000, 'Property features misrepresented', 'hearing_scheduled', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 8 DAY)),
('004-400-005', NOW(), 410000, 380000, 'Assessment exceeds recent appraisal', 'pending', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 11 DAY));
